message:
fix(export): prevent XSS via HTML entity escaping in pages index title

The render_index_html function interpolated the user-supplied title
directly into the HTML template without escaping. A beads repo whose
name contains angle brackets, ampersands, or quotes could inject
arbitrary HTML/JS into the exported pages index.

Add an escape_html helper that replaces the five dangerous characters
(&, <, >, ", ') with their HTML entity equivalents, and apply it to the
title before interpolation. This follows OWASP XSS prevention rules for
HTML element content.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
